summary: A board-led analysis page with one core diagnosis anchor and a small set of compressed support clusters, suitable for the final analysis page before recommendation.
composition_pattern: core diagnosis anchor with surrounding compressed support clusters and one directional bridge layer
support_structure: one quiet or compact evidence support area
one directional bridge block near the lower or outer edge
when_to_use: The slide is diagnosis-board-led rather than chart-led
The page is closing the analysis section and must point into recommendation
One issue or tension should anchor the page more strongly than the other support clusters
avoid_when: The page has one dominant chart strong enough to lead the body
The page is actually a clean two-option comparison better handled by a table or two-pillar family
